selections.rationale: All 11 audits passed with 0 BLOCKING and 0 CRITICAL issues. Resonance audit: 70/100 ≥ 65 threshold, explicit §5.4 放行（无需 revision / 无需人因）. Memo-compliance: 10/10. Anti-AI: 10/10 with author_intent exemption. Pacing: 8/10 PASS.

No BLOCKING/CRITICAL issues to fix. Resonance shortfalls (场景临场感 12/25, 情感落地 18/30) are non-blocking and intrinsic to workday parameter narrative mode. Both explicitly marked as future-chapter recommendations not current revision targets.

场景临场感 12/25: 0 sensory words is author_intent hard constraint (workday pure parameter mode). Roughness absent presence mechanism is intentional design choice. TENSION flagged for human review by POST_WRITE_SELF_CHECK — not fixable via automatic revision without violating workday constraint.

情感落地 18/30: Emotion conveyed only through parameter state declarations ('knows'/'present at') — intrinsic to pure parameter declaration mode. Resonance audit confirms '这是参数宣告模式的本质约束，非缺陷'. Not a revision target.

Anti-AI audit ERROR: 420 dashes. This is structural format feature of parameter declaration mode 'X知道Y——X在场于Z' — not AI-style dash abuse. author_intent documented in PRE_WRITE_CHECK. With exemption: 10/10 PASS.

Pacing 8/10 suggestions (蓄压长度, 句式变奏, 落差信号) are actionable for future workdays, not Monday-specific revision. Post-declaration Monday's design is intentionally single-format declarative — pacing variation is a future-chapter consideration.

adjustments.rationale: 场景临场感 shortfall deferred: absent presence mechanism requires human review to confirm if it meets scene presence needs as parameter-narrative equivalent. Next workday (Tuesday) could include 1-2 sensory anchors if author decides to relax workday constraint.

情感落地 shortfall is intrinsic constraint of pure parameter declaration mode. Not a defect — acknowledged by resonance audit as '本质约束，非缺陷'. Future chapters with relaxed constraints can include emotional show.
Three pacing MINOR suggestions (蓄压≤3章, 句式变奏, 落差信号) deferred to future workday planning. Ch55 is first post-declaration workday — uniform pacing is by design. Apply to subsequent workdays.

pre_revision_audit_summary.resonance_verdict: 放行（无需 revision / 无需人因）
